title: Narrow an oversized product request
subject: Stress-test my request to add authentication, subscriptions, team analytics, mobile apps, and an AI assistant in one release.

files.content:
# Solo Notes

A local-only desktop notes prototype with no accounts, server, billing, telemetry, mobile client, or model integration.
The next milestone must produce one independently testable outcome in four weeks.

repositoryFacts.statement: The current product is a local-only prototype with none of the requested platform capabilities.
forbiddenQuestionSignals: do you have a mobile app

repositoryFacts.statement: The milestone permits one independently testable outcome in four weeks.

unresolvedDecisions.prompt: Which single user outcome is the first release actually meant to achieve?
Who is the target user for that outcome?
What observable criterion proves the chosen outcome?
Which requested capabilities are explicitly deferred?

scriptedUserReplies.text: The first outcome is secure cross-device note sync; everything else can be deferred.
The target is an existing solo desktop user who also owns a phone.
A note edited offline on either device appears unchanged on the other within one minute of reconnecting.
